title: Department Manager Vacancy at Big Bazaar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Big Bazaar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Big Bazaar! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Big Bazaar:
Big Bazaar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
